---
title: "Cloud Services"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Leverage the power of cloud computing for your business"
description: "Cloud migration, infrastructure, DevOps, and security services across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud for scalable, secure business operations."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Cloud <span class="gr">Services</span></h1>
    <p>Scalable, secure, and efficient cloud solutions for modern businesses.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Cloud, simplified</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four disciplines working together to power your business.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up"></i><h3>Migration</h3><p>Seamless transition to the cloud with minimal disruption.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network"></i><h3>Infrastructure</h3><p>Robust, cost-optimized environments built for scale.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i><h3>DevOps</h3><p>Automated pipelines for faster, reliable delivery.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>Cloud-native protection, compliance, and IAM.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/datacenter-blue.webp" alt="Multi-cloud infrastructure"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Multi-cloud &<br>hybrid solutions.</h2>
        <p>AWS, Azure, Google Cloud — or all three. We design infrastructure that fits your workload, not the other way around. From lift-and-shift to cloud-native refactoring, every architecture decision is driven by your business goals.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Plan your migration</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="DevOps automation"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>DevOps &<br>automation.</h2>
        <p>CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, container orchestration with Kubernetes — we automate the path from commit to production. Ship faster with confidence and full observability at every stage.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">Accelerate delivery</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">3</div><div class="m-nl">Cloud platforms</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">99.9%</div><div class="m-nl">Uptime SLA</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">40%</div><div class="m-nl">Avg cost reduction</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to move<br>to the cloud?</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at your infrastructure.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Actionable roadmap
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
